untranslatable_reason: The signal requires: (1) exact count of '13 consecutive new price lines' — no allowed indicator directly counts consecutive bars making new highs; (2) detection of 'overhead resistance' as a qualitative feature — would need custom resistance detection logic not in allowed indicators; (3) identification of a candlestick 'taller than 146% of average height of past 22 days' — requires custom calculation (range > 1.46 * avg(range, 22)) which cannot be expressed with allowed indicator names. Used proxy conditions (Donchian upper, high price position, tall candle via ATR) but cannot precisely replicate the 13-bar consecutive new high pattern.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using: (1) dc_upper for new highs detection, (2) price_pos_20 > 0.9 for price near top of 20-day range (simulating overhead resistance context), (3) range > atr_20 to detect abnormally tall candlestick. Exit uses sma_20 crossover as reversal signal per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Pattern counting logic is not expressible with allowed indicators.
